tagline: Enjoy stress-free pool ownership with a service and maintenance team you can count on across southern Wisconsin.

hero.headline:
Wisconsin Pool Care Done Right,
Every Time
hero.subheadline: Your pool should be your escape, not your weekend chore. New Wave Pools brings 100+ years of combined experience and PHTA-certified technicians to handle every detail so you can simply enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Service Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Open to Close
services.subtitle: From your first spring opening to the final winterization, our PHTA-certified team handles every aspect of pool ownership so you never have to worry.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Seasonal startup and winterization done right. We inspect equipment, balance chemistry, and protect your investment through harsh Wisconsin winters.

cards.title: Weekly & Bi-Weekly Maintenance
cards.description: Flexible maintenance plans that keep your pool and hot tub clean, balanced, and swim-ready all season. Daily, weekly, or bi-weekly options available.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Upgrades
cards.description: Heaters, pumps, filters, salt systems, and automation. Our fully stocked trucks mean most repairs are completed in a single visit.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Premium vinyl liners from Merlin Industries, Latham, and TARA installed by experienced technicians. Free estimates on every project.

cards.title: Auto Cover Services
cards.description: Expert installation, repair, and maintenance of automatic pool covers for year-round safety and convenience.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Programs
cards.description: Full-service opening, maintenance, and closing for swim clubs, water parks, and facilities with compliance support and dedicated account management.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Evaluation
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we will send a PHTA-certified technician to assess your needs. Honest pricing, no pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our lead technicians each bring 10 to 30 years of hands-on experience. Fully stocked trucks, digital reporting, and on-time arrivals every visit.

steps.title: Dive In and Relax
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all season. Track your service history and water chemistry anytime through our online customer portal.

about.label: Why Southern Wisconsin Trusts Us
about.headline: 100+ Years of Combined Experience Backing Every Service Call
about.description: Since 2013, New Wave Pools has been the go-to pool service team across southern Wisconsin. Our PHTA-certified technicians carry a minimum of 10 years of field experience, with some bringing up to 30 years. We are fully insured, carry a 1-year workmanship warranty, and leverage digital tools so you always know what is happening with your pool.

features.title: PHTA-Certified Technicians
features.description: Every technician holds current PHTA certification with continuing education requirements, ensuring expert-level care on every visit.

features.title: 1-Year Workmanship Warranty
features.description: We stand behind every job. If something is not right within a year of service, we come back and make it right at no extra charge.

features.title: Digital Service Portal
features.description: Access your service history, water chemistry data, and scheduling through our convenient online portal. Full transparency, always.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service plan that fits your pool. Flexible scheduling, honest quotes, and no hidden fees — ever.

guarantee.headline: Our Workmanship Warranty Promise
guarantee.description: Every service we perform is backed by a 1-year workmanship warranty. If anything we touched is not performing as it should, we will return and correct it at no additional cost. With over 100 years of combined team experience and PHTA-certified technicians on every call, we deliver the kind of quality that has earned us 136 five-star reviews across southern Wisconsin.

faqs.question: What areas in Wisconsin do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of southern Wisconsin including Madison, Sun Prairie, Middleton, Verona, Cottage Grove, Stoughton, Lake Mills, Chenequa, and surrounding communities. If you are within the region, give us a call and we will confirm coverage.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and our technicians handle everything while you are away. You will receive a digital service report after every visit through our customer portal so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every lead technician is PHTA-certified with a minimum of 10 years of experience. Some of our senior technicians have up to 30 years in the industry. We also maintain continuing education requirements to stay current.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within one week. For urgent equipment failures or other time-sensitive issues, we do our best to accommodate same-week or next-day visits. Call us and we will work with your schedule.

faqs.question: Do you handle commercial pools and facilities?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide full-service commercial pool programs for swim clubs, water parks, and facilities including opening, ongoing maintenance, closing, and compliance support. Commercial clients receive dedicated account management.

testimonials.name: Jack H.
testimonials.text: I have NEVER had a problem with them. Top notch and extremely professional. Every visit is consistent and thorough.

testimonials.name: Amanda K.
testimonials.text: Prompt, efficient, reasonable, and professional. They are hands down the best pool service we have ever used in Wisconsin.

testimonials.name: Amber S.
testimonials.text: Prompt, courteous, professional and they get it right the first time. Our pool has never looked better since switching to New Wave.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure estimate within 48 hours. No hidden fees, no contracts — just honest service from PHTA-certified professionals.
